notes.source: 'curated' for the hand-maintained macro schedule, 'yfinance' for the generated earnings calendar.
notes.date: Event date as YYYY-MM-DD. For multi-day meetings, use the decision/announcement day.
notes.canonical_ids: Canonical instrument identifiers the event applies to; may be empty when asset_classes is used instead.
notes.asset_classes: Asset classes the event applies to (e.g. 'equity_index', 'commodity'); may be empty when canonical_ids is used instead.
notes.source_url: Official published schedule the entry was taken from.
